findings.description: Several property names from the CustomTagConfig table are missing from s2 hints: port, securePort, host, yyyymmddPattern, dateTimePattern, patternSeparator. Additionally, the class name DirectoryBasedResourcePathRule (referenced as the default value for resourcePathRule) is absent.
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists all these as first-column property names: port (URI指定でhttpとhttpsを切り替える際のhttp用ポート), securePort (https用ポート), host (ホストのデフォルト値), yyyymmddPattern (年月日フォーマット), dateTimePattern (日時フォーマット), patternSeparator (パターン区切り文字). resourcePathRule row states: 'デフォルトはDirectoryBasedResourcePathRuleのインスタンス。'
